title: juncus interior var. neomexicanus
intro: Juncus interior var. neomexicanus, also known as New Mexican rush or New Mexican blue rush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Juncaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat various ailments such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Juncus interior var. neomexicanus include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which are often used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
